description: Reported that emergency exit on floor 2 of fabrication shop is partially blocked by stored raw materials, creating fire evacuation risk
resolution_summary: Materials relocated within 24 hours; area marked with floor markings; monthly audit of emergency exits added to EHS checklist

description: Claims overtime of 18 hours in December 2025 was not included in January salary; payslip shows zero OT hours despite supervisor-approved OT forms submitted
resolution_summary: Investigation found OT forms were stuck in supervisor's pending approvals in HRMS; forms approved and OT payment processed in February salary with interest

description: Reports that a senior procurement manager regularly uses inappropriate language and publicly humiliates team members during meetings; 3 specific incidents described
resolution_summary: ICC conducted investigation per POSH policy; witness statements corroborated; manager given written warning and mandatory behavioral counseling; situation monitored for 6 months

description: Feels bypassed for promotion to Senior Design Engineer despite 4 years in role and consistently high ratings (3.8+ for 3 years); less experienced colleague promoted instead
resolution_summary: Review found promotion decision was based on specific project leadership experience; Kiran assigned to lead a new project to build required experience; promotion to be reconsidered in next cycle
employee_satisfied: Partially — accepted explanation but wants clear criteria

description: Extended work hours (10+ hrs/day regularly) during month-end close; no compensatory time off; affecting personal health and family commitments
resolution_summary: Finance team restructured to distribute month-end workload; 2 additional temporary resources approved for peak periods; flexible hours policy extended to finance team during close

description: Canteen food quality has significantly deteriorated since new vendor took over in January; stale food served twice in March; many employees bringing food from home
resolution_summary: Canteen vendor given formal notice with 15 specific quality issues; food quality audit implemented (weekly); vendor on 30-day improvement probation; backup vendor identified
